signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb), below market forecasts of 2.4% amid Middle East-driven energy shocks.**[1]
